[cron:9423c130-bdbd-4296-958a-f56330fa7bdd ghl-upsell-timing-6h] L2 UPSELL TIMING ENGINE: Analyze recent buyer engagement and value-ladder position in GHL. Identify contacts eligible for mid-ticket community or high-ticket coaching upsell based on event evidence (purchase age, engagement signals, appointment behavior, response activity). Apply low-risk actions only: upsell-readiness tags, route-stage nudges, and follow-up task creation with recommended offer path. Do not send outbound messages or invoices. If unusually high intent cluster appears, return urgent summary with top opportunities.
